yoga_list.name: Gajakesari Yoga
yoga_list.description: In this horoscope, there is no Gajakesari Yoga

yoga_list.name: Kedara Yoga
yoga_list.description: Kedara Yoga is formed when all the planets are positioned within any four signs. In this horoscope, Mars resides in the 5th House, Venus & Jupiter are in the 8th house, Sun, Moon & Mercury resides in the 9th house and Saturn is in the 11th House. This special arrangement, with all planets in four houses, satisfies the condition for the formation of Kedara Yoga.

yoga_list.name: Raja Yoga
yoga_list.description: In this chart there is relationship between Moon, Sun, Venus, Jupiter, Mars and Saturn planets. A typical Raja Yoga happens when two or more than two planets (out of which atleast one should be the lord of 'Kendra' & the other should be the lord of 'Trikon') is in a relationship with each other. This relationship can be a combination, bidirectional vision or exchange of zodiacs. A person with a Raja Yoga enjoys social status and fame.  Recognition and laurels will follow them for their efforts on various matters.

yoga_list.name: Anapha Yoga
yoga_list.description: When planets, excluding the Sun, are situated in the twelfth house from the Moon, it leads to the formation of Anapha Yoga. In this horoscope, twelfth house from Moon is occupied Venus and Jupiter, satisfying the conditions for the formation of Anapha Yoga.

yoga_list.name: Vasi Yoga
yoga_list.description: When planets, excluding the Moon, occupy the twelfth house from the Sun, it results in the formation of Vasi Yoga. In this horoscope, twelfth house from Sun is occupied Venus and Jupiter, satisfying the conditions for the formation of Vasi Yoga.

yoga_list.name: Daridra Yoga
yoga_list.description: Daridra Yoga is formed when the lords of the 12th and Lagna exchange positions and are conjoined or aspected by the 7th lord. In this horoscope, Mars, the lord of lagna, resides in Fifth house with Mars, a malefic planet and is receiving an aspect from both Venus, the lord of second house and Venus, the lord of seventh house, the lagna lord, Mars, in conjunction with Mars, the lord of 8th house. Also, receiving an aspect from Saturn, a malefic planet and Sun, lord of fifth house, in conjunction with Mercury, the lord of sixth house without benefic association, indicating the formation of Daridra Yoga.
